justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially missed the user's preferred date and time, requiring a clarification in Turn 3 and Turn 4.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative times on a different day after the initial request was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent repeatedly asked for the exact date even after the user provided it, leading to unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The repeated request for the date made the conversation feel less efficient and slightly frustrating.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent successfully recovered by offering alternative dates and times when the initial request was unavailable, maintaining context of the topic and contact medium.
